channel.title: Microsoft Cloud on Husenjan
channel.description: Recent content in Microsoft Cloud on Husenjan

item.title: Shared Mailbox & Mail Enabled Security Group
item.description: Introduction What is the difference between a Shared Mailbox and Mail-Enabled Security Group? The difference between them is Shared Mailbox is recommended for collaboration meanwhile Mail-Enabled Security Group is recommended if you need a Security Group which you can send emails to as a distribution list.
